workflow_name: Successor package readiness review bundle refresh
decision_basis_note: Promotion-ready package evidence is complete, benchmark replay is reproducible, review packet evidence is sufficient, and unresolved-bundle rationale supports advancing with review gate.
operator_instruction: Update this file only after a human reviewer has inspected the benchmark decision packet, promotion-readiness evidence, unresolved-bundle evidence, and output inventory.
non_authoritative_note: This template records operator review only. It does not authorize policy change or automatic promotion.
